chosen_action.title: Stop re-surfacing current-chat final-reply manual packets as fresh do-now work

why_this_action.summary: The TLDL manual publisher packet had already been delivered at 2026-05-27T03:41:50+02:00 via current_chat_final_reply, but the selector/execution-board path still treated it as waiting. That made the loop capable of selecting fake-progress manual follow-through again instead of honoring the live review window.

result.summary: Patched manual-delivery detection so current_chat_final_reply deliveries suppress reused manual outreach assets on both selector and execution-board paths, then refreshed the board and lane state.

runtime.board_state: No do-now handoff packet is currently truthful in this review window.

known_unrelated_failures: agents.marketing.tests.test_distribution_lane_selector_repair_pause.DistributionLaneSelectorRepairPauseTests.test_load_recent_monitor_summary_clears_reddit_blocked_when_browser_session_is_ready -> expected reddit_blocked False but got True

expected_outcome: The active loop no longer burns a slot re-delivering the already-used TLDL packet and now truthfully stays in measurement_hold until a genuinely executable lane opens or a stronger repair ships.

measurement_window.success_metric: distribution_lane_latest.json stays off the already-delivered manual publisher asset during the current review window and the execution board keeps that packet out of Best executable assets still waiting.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If the delivered TLDL packet reappears as do-now work before the 2026-06-03 review checkpoint, escalate into a broader manual-delivery identity/fingerprint repair.
